name: the-another-multi-brand-global-styles
description: Define Brands - URL match rules (whole domains or path sections) with per-Brand global style overrides and content variables - on a single WordPress install.
author: The Another

scripts.plugin-zip: composer build && sh scripts/dist-archive.sh && node scripts/version-zip.js
scripts.plugin-zip:check: composer build && sh scripts/dist-archive.sh && node scripts/version-zip.js --label=test
